description: You are an audio archivist digitizing an interrupted oral history cassette recording. Restore the continuous conversation in the current Ardour session using the 15-second files for Side A and Side B located in /home/ga/Audio/digitization/. Assemble the files on a single track named 'Oral History Archive - Tape 042' with a 2-second overlap between the end of Side A and the start of Side B. Include a session marker named 'Tape Flip' at the start of the Side B segment and export the master as a WAV file to /home/ga/Audio/archival_exports/master_tape_042.wav.
